name: Berry Jams
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the berries, water, Kool Aid, and pectin in a large pot.
2. Bring to a full boil over high heat.
3. Add 4-6 cups of sugar to the mixture.
4. Return to a boil and maintain a rolling boil for 5-10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and pour into sterilized jars.
6. Seal the jars properly.
Makes 3-4 pints.
